channel.title: Projects on Hugo O Rivera
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Hugo O Rivera

item.title: Configuration files
item.description: I find it useful to store all configuration files for OSX and Linux programs in a publicly accessible git repo (github.com/roguh/confs.git). Notable files: Configuration files for several text editors with vim keybindings, like vis, emacs (with evil mode), and neovim/vim Useful utilities for various tasks, such as an alias command with fallbacks and shortcuts for mounting gocryptfs volumes. A few posts on reddit
